title: Ecobank Disburses N16 Million to Customers in Super Rewards Millionaire Geng Promo - FinancialEDGE
description: Ecobank Nigeria has awarded N16 million in cash rewards to customers since the launch of its Super Rewards Millionaire Geng Promo in July 2024. html:
Ecobank Nigeria has awarded N16 million in cash rewards to customers since the launch of its Super Rewards Millionaire Geng Promo in July 2024. Mr. Otega Odjegba, the Regional Head of Ecobank’s Apapa-Isolo Region, shared this information during a recent monthly and quarterly raffle draw held in Lagos.

This six-month campaign, which will run until December 31, 2024, aims to reward 540 customers with various cash prizes. Odjegba emphasized that this deposit mobilization initiative is part of the bank’s efforts to enhance the lives of its customers in appreciation of their loyalty.

“Our primary goal is to simplify life for our customers and empower them to lead richer lives. We celebrate and value our customers for choosing us,” he stated.

He noted that both new and existing individual customers across the country are eligible to participate. He encouraged those who have yet to open an account with Ecobank to do so and take advantage of the bank’s advanced digital services and top-tier banking experience.

Mr. Victor Yalokwu, Head of Consumer Product and Segment at Ecobank Nigeria, explained that the campaign’s qualification criteria are straightforward, ensuring broad participation among customers.

To qualify, customers need to maintain a minimum balance of N10,000 in their accounts for at least 30 days. “We plan to reward a total of 512 customers with N42 million, with prizes divided into monthly, quarterly, and grand categories,” he said.

“As we enter the second half of the campaign, now is your chance to win. For the monthly draw, simply deposit ₦10,000 and keep it for 30 days for a chance to win ₦50,000. For the quarterly draw, you can either deposit ₦50,000 monthly for three months or ₦150,000 for 90 days to stand a chance to win ₦500,000. For the grand draw, deposit ₦300,000 and maintain it for 180 days to potentially win a grand prize of ₦2,000,000. Remember, you also need to complete at least two transactions monthly through our digital channels to qualify.”

Left: Regional Head, Apapa/Isolo Region Lagos, Ecobank Nigeria, Otega Odjegba;  Observer, National Lottery Regulatory Commission, Dodo Chinyere;
